'''[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Vensell Picutorion''' was the head of [[House Picutorion]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. He was presumably from [[Picutorion/Legends|Picutorion]], and had been present at [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Senatorial]] debut.

He came to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in 12 ABY in order to meet with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]] and [[Irek Ismaren]] about the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
